description: Gathrd is a product-saving service that lets users save, organise, and track items from multiple retailers across iPhone, web, and ChatGPT-connected flows. It focuses on collections, saved items, and price-drop tracking rather than acting as a retailer or checkout service.
summary: Gathrd exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://gathrd.uk/mcp`; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found.
